calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-06-2007 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up.
Off Calendar Jul-31-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: F. Butler.
Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq. special appearance for Plaintiff: Chase Manhattan Bank USA, N.A.
Plaintiff's Witness: Mike Conrath, was sworn and direct examined.
After hearing the testimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: Anneyse B. Linsky as follows:
Damages $27,795.71
Prejudgment Interest $3,402.00
Attorney Fees $3,003.22
Costs $397.00, for a total of $34,597.93
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-18-2007 Continued To Aug-17-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-09-2007 Continued To Jun-29-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212
